outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Day 34: Oil surges 8% as Trump vows to hit Iran 'extremely hard' — Asia markets plunge
outlets.summary: Coverage of overnight oil surge reversing peace-hope dip, Trump escalation vow, and Asia-Pacific market falls.

outlets.name: The Intercept
outlets.headline: 'Casualty Cover-Up': The Pentagon Is Hiding U.S. Losses Under Trump
outlets.summary: Investigation alleging Pentagon sending outdated casualty statements, resulting in undercounts of US dead and wounded.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Watchdog blasts BBC, CNN, NYT for applying 'war crime' label almost exclusively to US-Israel
outlets.summary: CAMERA study: 88% of 'war crime' labels in major media directed at US/Israel, zero exclusively at Iran.

outlets.name: White House
outlets.headline: President Trump's Clear and Unchanging Objectives Drive Decisive Success Against Iranian Regime
outlets.summary: Official press release outlining war achievements: decimated navy, shattered air force, eliminated terrorist leaders.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: UK to host meeting of 35 countries on reopening Strait of Hormuz — US absent
outlets.summary: Coverage of UK FM Cooper's 35-nation virtual summit on Hormuz, notable for US absence.

outlets.name: Middle East Eye
outlets.headline: China and Pakistan issue five-point plan for immediate ceasefire in war on Iran
outlets.summary: First major power ceasefire framework: ceasefire + Hormuz reopening + comprehensive peace under UN Charter.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Day 34: Hezbollah fires 50+ rockets at north on Passover; Iran cluster warheads wound 4 in Bnei Brak
outlets.summary: Liveblog coverage of Passover attacks: 4 Iran salvos overnight, Hezbollah barrage, IDF kills 40+ operatives.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Israel's Military Is Stretched to Breaking Point and Faces Familiar Deadly Stalemate in Lebanon
outlets.summary: Analysis of IDF strain across multiple fronts and familiar patterns in Lebanon ground campaign.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Iran's President Pezeshkian pens open letter to American people: 'Look beyond war propaganda'
outlets.summary: Full text of Pezeshkian's open letter questioning whose interests are served by the war.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: IRGC designates 18 American tech corporations as military targets
outlets.summary: IRGC unprecedented listing of Apple, Google, Meta, Nvidia, Boeing as targets with employee evacuation orders.
